artPrompt: A surging wall of ordinary townsfolk charging downhill across a sunlit town green in foreshortened low-angle fury, blank lawn placards raised like spears, the front rank pounding toward the viewer with grim resolve. Golden afternoon light backlights the swelling crowd, leafy green and ivory dust kicked up underfoot, picket fences splintering ahead, an unstoppable civic stampede, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Landslide of the People
text:
Creatures you control get +2/+2 and gain trample until end of turn. They must attack this turn if able, and must attack the player who controls the most permanents if able.
This is the part where the grassroots movement becomes an actual landslide. Bring boots.
flavorText: The rival's deck has a "Landslide Victory." Ours has a landslide. The difference is who's standing at the bottom of the hill.

extras.frontrunnerPunish: alpha strike forced at the leader
